description_long: This doll features a whimsical, blob-like pink body with two small, rounded horns protruding from the top, giving it a playful and imaginative appearance. Its face is simple, with two small black eyes and a thin, straight mouth, set into the smooth pink surface. The lower edge of the body has a draped, uneven hem resembling a soft, flowing cloak or blanket, partially covering a frilled white and gray skirt. Two cylindrical legs extend downward, colored in a dark gray with lighter gray tips, suggesting stylized boots or stockings. The overall form is soft and rounded, with no sharp edges, and the surface appears matte and slightly textured. The design is minimalistic yet expressive, making it suitable as a toy or decorative figure in urban parks or playgrounds.
description: A pink, horned doll with a simple face, draped cloak-like body, frilled skirt, and dark cylindrical legs. Its soft, rounded form and minimalistic features give it a playful, imaginative look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, pink body, horns, frilled skirt, and both legs clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the horn, the draped edge of the cloak, and one leg partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the pink cloak, both horns, and the skirt's frilled edge with both legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the horn, the flowing edge of the cloak, and one leg in full view.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a frilled white and gray skirt beneath a draped, pink cloak-like garment with an uneven hem, evoking a playful, fantasy-inspired style reminiscent of whimsical or cartoonish characters.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both legs straight and parallel, arms and hands are not visible, and the head is centered above the body, giving a static, balanced posture.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral facial expression with small, round black eyes and a thin, straight mouth, showing no distinct emotion.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is fully covered by the smooth, pink cloak-like surface.
